theme: fuel blending through a fixed tank ladder
title: Sacrificial Premixes on a Fixed Tank Ladder
strategies: trivial: fill each tank with a single homogeneous feedstock, picking whichever one prices best alone (checker baseline)

greedy: fill each tank directly with a 2-feedstock split chosen under a LINEAR (volume-weighted average) blending assumption -- never premixes, and the true power-law mixing rule makes it mispredict which corridor it lands in

strong: evaluates recipes under the TRUE power-mean mixing law and searches 2-stage plans -- transfer a whole earlier tank (a sacrificial off-spec premix) into a later tank alongside one more feedstock, reaching compositions no direct <=2-feedstock recipe can reach, net of the opportunity cost of not selling the premix tank on its own

headroom above strong: deeper premix chains (3+ stages), joint global assignment of which tanks feed which (not just a last-to-first local exchange), and searching 2-feedstock remainder fills instead of one
